attacking_style: Long-range attacks around 50km from finish, willing to take significant risks with early moves. Colombian-style aggressive timing rather than waiting for final climbs.
team_tactics: EF provides attacking platform but lacks depth to sustain pressure against stronger teams like Jumbo-Visma. Rider often committed to solo efforts without extended team support.
terrain_preference: Suited to explosive accelerations on climbs where he can match top-tier GC riders. Descent handling appears aggressive but potentially compromises race position.
vulnerability: Exposed when elite teams like Jumbo-Visma deploy depth to neutralize long attacks. High-risk descending and positioning decisions can undo strong climbing performances.
key_patterns: Launches attacks 45-50km from finish, far earlier than conventional GC racing tactics.
Matches accelerations from top GC riders like Roglic, showing elite climbing ability across stages.
Takes risks on descents that can result in mechanical issues or lost positions.
form_trajectory: neutral: showed ability to match elite climbers but aggressive tactics and mechanical bad luck prevented converting form into results
